samples.gvd:
module fsm #(
    parameter s0 = 3'b000,
    parameter s1 = 3'b001,
    parameter s2 = 3'b010,
    parameter s3 = 3'b011,
    parameter s4 = 3'b100,
    parameter s5 = 3'b101
) (
    input IN,
    output reg MATCH,
    input CLK,
    input RST
); 
    
    reg [2:0] ST_cr, ST_nr;
    
    always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
        if (RST) begin
            ST_cr <= s0;
        end else begin
            ST_cr <= ST_nr;
        end
    end
    
    always @(*) begin
        case (ST_cr)
            s0: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    ST_nr = s1;
                end else begin
                    ST_nr = s0;
                end
            end
            
            s1: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    ST_nr = s1;
                end else begin
                    ST_nr = s2;
                end
            end
            
            s2: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    ST_nr = s1;
                end else begin
                    ST_nr = s3;
                end
            end
            
            s3: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    ST_nr = s4;
                end else begin
                    ST_nr = s0;
                end
            end
            
            s4: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    ST_nr = s5;
                end else begin
                    ST_nr = s2;
                end
            end
            
            s5: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    ST_nr = s1;
                end else begin
                    ST_nr = s2;
                end
            end
            
            default: begin
                ST_nr = s0;
            end
        endcase
    end
    
    always @(*) begin
        if (RST) begin
            MATCH = 0;
        end else begin
            if (ST_cr == s4 && IN == 1) begin
                MATCH = 1;
            end else begin
                MATCH = 0;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Mealy FSM detection circuit that detects the sequence '10011' in the input signal IN. Outputs MATCH=1 when the sequence is detected, and MATCH=0 otherwise. Supports continuous input and loops through the sequence.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Input signal to be detected.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock signal for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal to initialize the FSM.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output signal indicating whether the sequence '10011' has been detected.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        Always @(posedge CLK or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                MATCH <= 0;
            end else begin
                case ({IN, MATCH})
                    2'b10: MATCH <= 0;
                    2'b01: MATCH <= 0;
                    2'b00: MATCH <= 0;
                    2'b11: MATCH <= 1;
                    default: MATCH <= 0;
                endcase
            end
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
